title: IndustrialDeco (Street Lamps)
body:
Have you ever been infuriated with the lack of mods adding modern-ish industrial decorations to modern Minecraft versions? Fear not! This mod fixes that!

Contents:

- Street lamps - Because lanterns are boooring
- Office-style light fixtures - Now you can experience the horror of a 9-5 office job IN MINECRAFT!
- Security cameras - Literally 1984
- Distribution boxes - Now you can trip the breaker without your whole faminly yelling at you!
- Small wire boxes - A place for you to stuff all of your "expert-level" wiring
- Wires - to make the "expert-level" wiring
- Wall switches - Come on, who doesn't love a big rotary switch?
- Cage lamps - Now you call your apartment "loft" and sell it for 2x as much!
- Warning poles - They only speak Polish tho
- Chimneys - Because no other mod adds these!1!11!
- EUR-Pallet - Dimensionally accurate!
- Benches - With anti-homeless railings already installed!
- Metal fences - Because wood isn't hard _enough_
- Crossbucks - So people can't claim liability after being hit by your train

  
Blocks can now be rotated, or their type changed, by right-clicking with a _**properly tagged**_ wrench, or a stick (I am NOT adding a wrench, too many mods already have those). Some blocks can also be picked up with the Create mods' wrench.

![An image with all the mod contents (in version 0.0.1) visible](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5740e2b5260a4f50d09ceb2450028c7e0955ec31.png)
![Blocks added in 0.7.0](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/yP3WOSCW/images/6a92b2b1a3eb46de42a8ab76ba7fba2ad0b17a90.png)
![New office light fixtures and wire boxes added in 0.4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/yP3WOSCW/images/4cc547cb1a64b43ca3289dd6f34f95a04acde2c5.png)
![Benches added in 0.0.5](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/yP3WOSCW/images/2bc771e0cc6f933ac56903f9fc0357211fc14289.png)
![Stuff added in 1.0.0](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/yP3WOSCW/images/856431d5017a97119f6fa3a74c75b4afc9ae1ade.png)

Ideas for more stuff I should add are more than welcome on the GitHub issue tracker
